issues.description: First action is completely wrong. The effect does not Rest a character - it prevents an already rested character from becoming active in the next Refresh Phase. This is a 'freeze' or 'skip untap' effect, not a Rest action.

Second action is wrong. The effect sets a DON!! card as active at end of turn, not immediately. GiveDon typically adds new DON!! cards, but this effect activates an existing rested DON!! at a delayed timing (end of turn).
The target scope for the first action should specify 'rested' characters only (up to 1 rested opponent Character), not all opponent characters.
